tasks.name: code_gen
tasks.label: Code Generation
tasks.output:
```python
def get_nth_fibonacci(n, memo={0: 0, 1: 1}):
    if n in memo:
        return memo[n]
    
    memo[n] = get_nth_fibonacci(n - 1, memo) + get_nth_fibonacci(n - 2, memo)
    return memo[n]
```
